query:
SELECT c.id as customer_id, c.company as customer_name, p.id as project_id, p.title as project_title, p.project_number
FROM customers c
JOIN projects p ON p.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.company LIKE '%murfit%' OR c.company LIKE '%murfi%'
ORDER BY p.id;
